kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.card-title >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg:

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Error: locator.waitFor: Error: strict mode violation: locator('//*[@id="itemc"]') resolved to 3 elements: 1) Phones aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Phones' }) 2) Laptops aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Laptops' }) 3) Monitors aka getByRole('link', { name: 'Monitors' }) Call log: - waiting for locator('//*[@id="itemc"]') to be visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
